{{Infobox character
| name = Gaien Arelius
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Gaien Arelius]] is a member of the [[Arelius family]] who may have claim to the head family seal if the real head family was wiped out.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Gaien Arelius]] revoked [[Eithan]]'s position.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gaien Arelius]] is the Patriarch of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gaien Arelius]] is an aging [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
